name: ASRock B760M-H2/M.2 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - 2x HDMI 2.1 - Dragon 2.5G LAN (B760M-H2/M.2)
shortName: ASRock B760M-H2/M.2 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 socket supporting DDR5 memory with PCIe 4.0 and WiFi connectivity.
